publicationGate: Field imagery must have a durable rights record and pass location-privacy review. Current-condition utilities require dated sources and explicit uncertainty.

slots.readerJob: label seams, current breaks, obstructions and depth transitions without claiming fish presence
slots.altText: Moving-water diagram labeling current seams, breaks, obstructions, depth transitions, and safe observation positions without marking fish locations.
slots.caption: Water-reading reference only; conditions, access, hazards, and regulations must be checked at the time of use.

slots.altText: Sequence diagram moving from field observation to one controlled adjustment, a recheck, and a stop condition.
slots.caption: The sequence supports disciplined adjustment; it does not predict a catch or safe access.

slots.readerJob: separate known conditions, uncertainty, manufacturer limits, leave-behind and plan changes
slots.caption: Packing and plan-change record with explicit unknown, equipment-limit, and leave-behind fields.

slots.readerJob: show dated source, threshold, stop action and return condition
slots.caption: Stop-gate record requiring a dated source, threshold, action, and return condition.
slots.reason: Weather-stop content remains on a material-risk hold until current sources and operational review are available.

slots.readerJob: apply delay, geographic generalization, metadata removal, landmark review and consent
slots.caption: Privacy checklist for delayed publication, location generalization, metadata removal, landmark review, and consent.

slots.readerJob: show brilliant water, weather and equipment relationships without identifying a sensitive place
slots.reason: No rights-cleared durable asset was verified that also passes location-safety review.
